extraction_notes: Business segments extracted as geographic reporting units (Americas, Europe, Greater China, Japan, Rest of Asia Pacific). Customer types and channels attached to each segment per ontology; offerings attached to Company to avoid duplication since filing states all segments provide similar products. Revenue models mapped to specific offerings based on filing descriptions (subscription for digital content services, transaction fees for payment platforms and App Store, hardware sales for devices, service fees for AppleCare, advertising/licensing for ad services).
